modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble setting up email on mobile device

full_description_text:
- Im trying to get my email set up on my phone.  
- How do I link my email on my cell phone?  
- I need help with adding mailbox to mobile phone.  
- Setting up email on my phone is not working.
short_description: Trouble setting up email on mobile device
description:

- How do I link my email on my cell phone?  
- I need help with adding mailbox to mobile phone.  
- Setting up email on my phone is not working.
